description.text: Two massive structures on a narrow spit of land. One Cube and a Base.

ru.original: Two massive structures on a narrow spit of land. One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Два массивных строения на клочке земли. Один куб и база.

es.original: Two massive structures on a narrow spit of land. One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Dos estructuras gigantes en un pequeño terruño.
Un generador y un núcleo.

de.original: Two massive structures on a narrow spit of land. One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Zwei massive Gebilde auf einer schmalen Spur von Land. Ein Generator und eine Basis.

fr.original: Two massive structures on a narrow spit of land. One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Deux structures monumentales sur une langue de terre étroite. Un cube et une base.

pt.original: Two massive structures on a narrow spit of land. One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Duas enormes estruturas numa faixa estreita de terra. Um Cubo e uma Base.
